'''Goratak III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Goratak system/Legends|Goratak system]] covered in crystalline wilderness known as the [[Crystal Forests]]. It was the site of a [[Mission to Goratak III|messy conflict]] between [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces.
